name: Airtable Share
description: A share link that provides external access to an Airtable base, view, or form. Share links can be enabled or disabled and optionally protected with a password.

shareId.description: The unique identifier for the share link (starts with 'shr').

type.description: The type of resource being shared.

state.description: The current state of the share link.

createdByUserId.description: The ID of the user who created the share link.

createdTime.description: The time when the share link was created.

baseId.description: The ID of the base this share link provides access to.

viewId.description: The ID of the specific view this share link provides access to. Null for base-level shares.

isPasswordEnabled.description: Whether the share link requires a password to access.

effectivePermissionLevel.description: The effective permission level granted to anyone accessing through this share link.
